text.title: hybrid-search-basics Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree selecting fusion strategy for a specific corpus. Branches lead to RRF, linear alpha, or skip-methodology with rule refs.

decision-tree.root-question: Are per-leg score distributions comparable across queries (calibrated)?

branch.when: bm25_max_score > 5 OR distributions vary by corpus size
branch.conclusion: Use RRF; do not attempt linear fusion.
Default to RRF; revisit after collecting labels.

example.description: For an open documentation corpus where BM25 scores reach 15-30, score scales are incomparable; RRF is mandatory.
